focus: Added optional `via` field to session-notes schema (v1.0.0 → v1.1.0) to record writing context (e.g. 'pi' or 'claude-code').
current_status: Schema replaced at .context/schemas/session-notes.schema.json; migration 1.0.0→1.1.0 declared (declarative-transform backfilling via='claude-code' on existing sessions).
